multiprocessing.sharedctypes/Process/dae.name: daemon
multiprocessing.sharedctypes/Process/dae.description: The process’s daemon flag, a Boolean value. This must be set before start() is called. The initial value is inherited from the creating process. When a process exits, it attempts to terminate all of its daemonic child processes. Note that a daemonic process is not allowed to create child processes. Otherwise a daemonic process would leave its children orphaned if it gets terminated when its parent process exits. Additionally, these are not Unix daemons or services, they are normal processes t...

multiprocessing.sharedctypes/deliver_cha.name: deliver_challenge
multiprocessing.sharedctypes/deliver_cha.description: Send a randomly generated message to the other end of the connection and wait for a reply. If the reply matches the digest of the message using authkey as the key then a welcome message is sent to the other end of the connection. Otherwise AuthenticationError is raised.
